name: Pro Filt'r Soft Matte Longwear Foundation
description: A long-wearing, full-coverage matte foundation that minimises pores and controls shine for up to 24 hours. Available in 50 inclusive shades.

name: Gloss Bomb Universal Lip Luminizer
description: A non-sticky, high-shine lip gloss that gives a universally flattering sheen on all skin tones. Infused with shea butter for comfortable wear.

name: Pillow Talk Matte Revolution Lipstick
description: The iconic Pillow Talk shade in a revolutionary matte formula that glides on like velvet without drying the lips. Long-lasting colour for 8 hours.

name: Ruby Woo Retro Matte Lipstick
description: A classic vivid blue-red retro matte lipstick. One of MAC's all-time bestsellers that delivers full, opaque coverage in a single swipe.

name: Powermatte Lip Pigment
description: An ultra-saturated liquid lip colour with a comfortable matte finish that lasts up to 16 hours. Intensely pigmented in a weightless formula.

name: Lip Contour 2.0 Lip Liner
description: A long-lasting creamy lip liner with a built-in sharpener that defines, fills and contours lips with precision. Pairs perfectly with any lip colour.

name: Soft Pinch Liquid Blush
description: A weightless liquid blush that blends effortlessly and stays put all day. A tiny amount gives a natural, buildable flush of colour.

name: Orgasm Blush
description: The iconic cult-favourite peachy-pink blush with golden shimmer that flatters every complexion. Buildable pigment for a natural-to-glam flush.

name: Flawless Filter Complexion Booster
description: A complexion booster that can be worn alone or mixed with foundation for an ethereal, lit-from-within glow. SPF 20 protection included.

name: Skin Long-Wear Weightless Foundation SPF 15
description: A weightless medium-to-full coverage foundation with SPF 15 that wears for 24 hours without budging. Comfortable all-day wear with a natural finish.

name: Naked3 Eyeshadow Palette
description: 12 rose-hued neutrals from shimmery to matte, perfect for a romantic smoky eye. Ultra-blendable formula for seamless colour payoff.

name: Obsessions Eyeshadow Palette – Rose Gold
description: 9 highly pigmented shadows in a stunning rose gold palette. Mix and match matte and shimmer shades for endless eye looks.

name: Sweet Peach Eyeshadow Palette
description: 18 peachy-keen shades infused with real peach extract for a soft, blendable formula. From sheer wash of colour to intense drama.

name: Studio Fix Powder Plus Foundation
description: A two-in-one powder foundation that provides medium-to-full matte coverage. Minimises the appearance of pores and imperfections for a flawless finish.

name: Epic Ink Liner
description: A waterproof felt-tip liquid liner that delivers precise, bold lines. The super-fine tip makes it easy to create everything from thin lines to dramatic wings.

name: Perversion Mascara
description: A volumising mascara that delivers extreme fullness, supreme length and serious curl without flaking or smudging throughout the day.

name: Better Than Sex Mascara
description: The number one prestige mascara that gives dramatic volume, length and bold definition. The hourglass-shaped brush coats every lash from root to tip.

name: Laguna Bronzer
description: A sun-kissed bronzing powder that mimics the look of a natural tan. The silky formula blends seamlessly for a warm, luminous finish.

name: Halo Glow Liquid Filter
description: A complexion-boosting liquid filter inspired by the Soft Focus Filter effect. Mix into foundation or wear alone for a radiant, glass-skin glow.

name: Fix+ Setting Spray
description: A lightweight hydrating spray that sets makeup and blends powder formulas into skin for a natural, seamless finish. Long-lasting all-day wear.

name: C-Firma Fresh Day Serum
description: A potent vitamin C day serum that firms, brightens and improves signs of photoageing. Formulated with 15% L-ascorbic acid and antioxidants.

name: Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% Serum
description: A high-strength vitamin and mineral serum that reduces the appearance of blemishes, congestion and pore size. Balances excess sebum production.

name: Hyalu B5 Pure Hyaluronic Acid Serum
description: A hydrating serum with two types of hyaluronic acid and vitamin B5 that visibly plumps and repairs the skin barrier. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Protini Polypeptide Cream
description: A protein-rich facial moisturiser that combines signal peptides, growth factors and amino acids for firmer, smoother and younger-looking skin.

name: Moisturising Cream
description: A non-greasy moisturising cream with three essential ceramides and hyaluronic acid that hydrates and helps restore the protective skin barrier.

name: Cicaplast Baume B5+ Multi-Purpose Balm
description: A soothing multi-purpose repairing balm for irritated, dry and damaged skin. Formulated with panthenol and madecassoside to accelerate skin recovery.

name: Foaming Facial Cleanser
description: A gentle foaming facial cleanser with niacinamide and ceramides that cleanses without stripping the skin. Ideal for normal to oily skin types.

name: Effaclar Purifying Foaming Gel
description: A purifying foaming gel cleanser for oily and acne-prone skin that removes excess oil and unclogs pores without drying out the skin.

name: Glycolic Acid 7% Toning Solution
description: An exfoliating toning solution with glycolic acid and amino acids that improves skin radiance, texture and clarity over time.

name: T.L.C. Framboos Glycolic Night Serum
description: A night serum blend of AHAs and BHAs that resurfaces, brightens and refines skin texture while you sleep. Delivers a smoother, more radiant complexion.

name: Anthelios UV Correct SPF 50+ Sunscreen
description: A daily face sunscreen with SPF 50+ and niacinamide that corrects dark spots while providing broad-spectrum UV protection. Lightweight, non-greasy formula.

name: Mineral UV Filters SPF 30
description: A lightweight mineral sunscreen with SPF 30 using zinc oxide and titanium dioxide. Free from chemical UV filters and fragrance.

name: No.3 Hair Perfector
description: A take-home treatment that reduces breakage and visibly strengthens hair. Uses the same bond-building chemistry as the in-salon treatments.

name: No.4 Bond Maintenance Shampoo
description: A reparative shampoo that maintains and enhances the results of Olaplex treatments at home. Strengthens and adds shine to all hair types.

name: No.5 Bond Maintenance Conditioner
description: A hydrating, reparative conditioner that restores moisture and strength to damaged hair. Helps reduce frizz and improves manageability.

name: Wishful Plump Filler Hair Serum
description: A lightweight serum that plumps each strand from within, adding volume and shine without weighing hair down.

name: Prep + Prime Fix+ Hair Mist
description: A lightweight refreshing mist that tames flyaways, adds shine and refreshes hair between washes. Infused with soothing ingredients.

name: Cocomino Glossing Conditioner
description: A glossing conditioner made with behentrimonium methosulfate and coconut oil that detangles, conditions and adds brilliant shine to all hair types.

name: Sauvage Eau de Parfum
description: A bold, powerful fragrance for men with top notes of bergamot, heart of Sichuan pepper and a base of ambroxan. Intensely fresh and sensual.

name: Black Opium Eau de Parfum
description: An addictive and energising fragrance with top notes of pink pepper and orange blossom, a heart of coffee and a warm base of white musk.

name: Chypre Rose Eau de Parfum
description: A sophisticated chypre rose fragrance inspired by the golden age of cinema. Warm and romantic with rose, patchouli and amber notes.

name: Miss Dior Blooming Bouquet Eau de Toilette
description: A delicate feminine fragrance with pink peony and white musks. Light, fresh and feminine with a graceful floral bouquet.

name: Libre Eau de Parfum
description: A bold and free feminine fragrance built on a paradox between lavender and orange blossom with warm base notes of vanilla and musk.

name: 182 Buffer Brush
description: A full, round brush designed to evenly blend and buff liquid, cream or powder products into skin for an airbrushed finish.

name: Full Coverage Face Brush
description: A flat, dense brush designed for applying and blending foundation and concealer for a flawless, airbrushed complexion.

name: Flawless Finish Sponge
description: A dual-sided beauty sponge with a flat edge for foundation and a pointed tip for concealer. Use damp for a seamless, airbrushed finish.

name: Pro Brush Set – 8 Piece Eye
description: An 8-piece professional-quality eyeshadow brush set covering all basic and advanced eye looks. Soft synthetic bristles for precise application.

name: Hydrating Body Wash
description: A gentle, soap-free body wash with ceramides and hyaluronic acid that cleanses and hydrates skin without stripping its natural moisture barrier.

name: Sili Body Lotion
description: A lightweight, fast-absorbing body lotion packed with ceramides, fatty acids and hyaluronic acid that deeply hydrates without greasiness.

name: Lipikar Baume AP+ Body Balm
description: A rich emollient balm for very dry and atopic skin with shea butter and niacinamide. Soothes intense dryness and relieves itching for 48 hours.
